# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "functionAppName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the function app"
      }
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the storage account"
      }
    },
    "keyVaultName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the key vault"
      }
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the SQL server"
      }
    },
    "cosmosDbAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the Cosmos DB account"
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "functionAppName": "[parameters('functionAppName')]",
    "storageAccountName": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
    "keyVaultName": "[parameters('keyVaultName')]",
    "sqlServerName": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
    "cosmosDbAccountName": "[parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')]",
    "resourceGroupName": "[resourceGroup().name]",
    "location": "[resourceGroup().location]"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2021-02-01",
      "name": "[variables('functionAppName')]",
      "location": "[variables('location')]",
      "kind": "functionapp",
      "properties": {
        "httpsOnly": true,
        "clientAffinityEnabled": false,
        "siteConfig": {
          "ftpsState": "Disabled",
          "http20Enabled": true,
          "functionAppScaleLimit": 100,
          "functionsRuntimeScaleMonitoringEnabled": true
        },
        "managedServiceIdentity": {
          "type": "SystemAssigned"
        }
      },
      "resources": [
        {
          "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites/config",
          "apiVersion": "2021-02-01",
          "name": "[concat(variables('functionAppName'), '/appsettings')]",
          "dependsOn": [
            "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName'))]"
          ],
          "properties": {
            "AzureWebJobsStorage": "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', variables('storageAccountName'), ';AccountKey=', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName')), '2019-06-01').keys[0].value, ';EndpointSuffix=', environment().suffixes.storage)]",
            "FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME": "dotnet",
            "FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION": "~4"
          }
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-01",
      "name": "[variables('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[variables('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "Standard_LRS"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2"
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[variables('keyVaultName')]",
      "location": "[variables('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "tenantId": "[subscription().tenantId]",
        "accessPolicies": [],
        "sku": {
          "name": "standard",
          "family": "A"
        },
        "enabledForDeployment": true,
        "enabledForTemplateDeployment": true,
        "enabledForDiskEncryption": true
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2020-11-01-preview",
      "name": "[variables('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[variables('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "sqladmin",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[concat('P@ssw0rd', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2021-04-15",
      "name": "[variables('cosmosDbAccountName')]",
      "location": "[variables('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "databaseAccountOfferType": "Standard",
        "consistencyPolicy": {
          "defaultConsistencyLevel": "Session"
        },
        "locations": [
          {
            "locationName": "[variables('location')]",
            "failoverPriority": 0
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('functionAppName'), 'storage-contributor')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName'))]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96f3dc33247')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('functionAppName'), 'keyvault-contributor')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', variables('keyVaultName'))]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'f25e0fa2-a7c8-4377-a976-54943a77a395')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('functionAppName'), 'sql-contributor')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', '056cd41c-7e88-42e1-9333-e79bf3d93fba')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments",
      "apiVersion": "2020-04-01-preview",
      "name": "[guid(resourceGroup().id, variables('functionAppName'), 'cosmosdb-contributor')]",
      "scope": "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', variables('cosmosDbAccountName'))]",
      "properties": {
        "roleDefinitionId": "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', 'cdb32785-3512-44d1-8884-1e321d338825')]",
        "principalId": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('functionAppName')), '2021-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      }
    }
  ]
}
